section.heading: Availability of funds appropriated for Agricultural Research Service for research related to tobacco or tobacco products

content.p: On and after December 26, 2007, none of the funds appropriated under this heading shall be available to carry out research related to the production, processing, or marketing of tobacco or tobacco products.

note.heading: References in Text
note.p: This heading, referred to in text, refers to the headings “Agricultural Research Service” and “salaries and expenses” of title I of div. A of the Consolidated Appropriations Act, 2008, Pub. L. 110–161.
